[["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","a|0|1|2|3|4|5","e3e3a018-24fa-4232-a558-0b062ebe3cb9","o|","manual","b|F","a|","a|7","id","name","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","rootTaskUuid","toolUseStates","chatHistory","feedbackStates","draftExchange","a|D|E|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R","","2026-01-22T08:04:38.191Z","2026-01-22T11:44:49.014Z","aws-sonnet-4.5","isAgentConversation","a|X","b|T","o|Y|Z","n|0","a3e781a8-bd3a-4812-b11f-7e6413361390","request_id","uuid","chatItemType","status","fromTimestamp","toTimestamp","seen_state","a|d|e|f|g|h|i|j","c1d320fd-da6e-4971-8c4f-631a913ac450","a5b30a92-5aa3-4e54-8973-e0d91bf2c2f2","agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","success","n|V917Z7F","seen","o|k|l|m|n|o|b|p|q","exchangeUuid","timestamp","request_message","a|f|s|t|u|g|j","exchange-pointer","791753c2-7a88-447a-9a0f-c53fbb2b485e","2026-01-22T08:11:40.090Z","仔细阅读项目文件，帮我重构读取测试用例并执行这一块的代码，目前data目录下的四份测试用例文件，后期我希望这些数据结构传入到测试脚本是同一的数据格式，且测试脚本也要支持同一个脚本支持所有的用例文件传入，支持选择性执行某些测试用例","o|v|w|x|y|z|o|q","7bd7b28d-2b11-4ad8-b18a-04b6766d3755","2026-01-22T08:11:49.738Z","o|v|w|11|12|T|o|q","5d9b0ac7-bba1-468b-89fe-2d906781742b","2026-01-22T08:11:57.809Z","o|v|w|14|15|T|o|q","80817d55-a523-4c35-ae0f-de22e4e2e8bf","2026-01-22T08:12:12.235Z","o|v|w|17|18|T|o|q","e0efdc4d-686b-41c2-9a31-8a6197614360","2026-01-22T08:12:19.299Z","o|v|w|1A|1B|T|o|q","4bef9026-ff68-4d56-a172-d78d3e6c90e5","2026-01-22T08:12:28.565Z","o|v|w|1D|1E|T|o|q","c1c4c912-ffcf-4b58-8f06-ad4c111badbe","2026-01-22T08:12:34.760Z","o|v|w|1G|1H|T|o|q","1efd3bf6-0860-4b3c-9d6b-bc5dcd649c2c","2026-01-22T08:12:41.094Z","o|v|w|1J|1K|T|o|q","6e732d88-ebda-41a1-b0ce-836275c32b3a","2026-01-22T08:13:02.198Z","o|v|w|1M|1N|T|o|q","308fe968-20e3-46ac-b495-d1e3b5bd8d21","2026-01-22T08:13:10.744Z","o|v|w|1P|1Q|T|o|q","559bca87-95d3-4548-8540-c0788897c8ff","2026-01-22T08:13:15.420Z","o|v|w|1S|1T|T|o|q","a|f|s|u|g|j","a4ad7236-d7af-4306-be51-c506c3aa6372","o|1V|w|1W|T|o|q","e24d9c20-d319-45f3-b6c7-eac636818c16","o|1V|w|1Y|T|o|q","3eab7409-6ee1-4454-9a6e-eb2d8c84d912","2026-01-22T08:13:22.663Z","o|v|w|1a|1b|T|o|q","e1fa7e73-5570-41c6-8780-b74ec20b900d","2026-01-22T08:13:32.976Z","o|v|w|1d|1e|T|o|q","478ab541-770f-4159-b432-8378089bf849","2026-01-22T08:14:05.306Z","o|v|w|1g|1h|T|o|q","temp-fe-851e4d64-9ea3-424a-ab74-c5ba8c38efe9","2026-01-22T08:24:26.792Z","继续","cancelled","o|v|w|1j|1k|1l|1m|q","a|d|g|f|j","19a923d8-8ba6-4489-af87-8751ed534b55","agentic-turn-delimiter","o|1o|1p|1m|1q|q","08d7a840-9ef3-4fd7-8fa0-270d0ccea93f","d8adc272-1178-4c92-abfe-fd41c1898978","n|V91CYQ1","o|k|1s|1t|n|o|p|1u|q","f54220b0-d6dd-4cfe-9300-ba8449dbbbd9","o|1o|1w|1m|1q|q","90d890a1-7149-4c75-84d5-9078c243fdc1","2026-01-22T08:24:57.424Z","o|v|w|1y|1z|1l|o|q","67beee93-1cbd-4d4e-a737-0adc6ae708e2","2026-01-22T08:25:40.948Z","o|v|w|21|22|T|o|q","83c21131-0397-46e3-91cc-463814fdf820","2026-01-22T08:26:07.888Z","o|v|w|24|25|T|o|q","b2ea84cc-0653-471e-bd29-2017c1034027","o|1V|w|27|T|o|q","7e86955c-1aa9-4d69-8124-750f242ffcb8","2026-01-22T08:26:16.019Z","o|v|w|29|2A|T|o|q","468924cf-c850-4e37-8be6-476f0a6fccf6","2026-01-22T08:26:38.172Z","o|v|w|2C|2D|T|o|q","summaryVersion","response_text","structured_output_nodes","a|f|2F|d|u|2G|2H|g|j|t","history-summary","n|3","2431389e-39e1-495f-9aa7-fd061febafea","

Summary was generated by Agent(you) so 'I' in the summary represents Agent(you).
Here is the summary:
<summary>
# Conversation Summary

## 1. Previous Conversation

The user requested help refactoring the test case reading and execution code for a Dify testing framework. The project currently has four test case CSV files in the `data` directory with different data structures. The user wants:
- A unified data format for all test case files when passed to test scripts
- A single test script that supports all case file types
- Support for selective execution of specific test cases

The workspace is located at `/Users/luzhikuan/Downloads/XF_Dify_framwork` with the current open file being `utils/test_case_model.py`.

## 2. Current Work

I was in the process of creating a comprehensive refactoring solution with three main components:

1. **Created `utils/test_case_model.py`** - A unified data model (`UnifiedTestCase` class) that standardizes all test case formats with fields including:
 - Basic info (case_id, target_agent, scene_description)
 - Input data (input_query, dynamic_inputs)
 - Session management (session_key, conversation_id)
 - Expected results (expected_action, assert_rules)
 - Extended fields (order_detail, chat_history, metadata)
 - Execution control (enabled, tags, priority)

2. **Created `utils/case_loader.py`** - A flexible case loader that:
 - Reads CSV files and automatically identifies their format
 - Supports multiple parsers for different CSV formats (golden_dataset, xiaofang_fz_cases, exports, default)
 - Converts all formats to the unified `UnifiedTestCase` model
 - Implements filtering capabilities (by case_ids, tags, target_agents, enabled status)
 - Successfully completed all parser implementations

3. **Next step was to create a unified test executor** - This was about to be implemented when the conversation was interrupted.

## 3. Key Technical Concepts

- **Pytest Framework**: Used for test execution with parametrization
- **Allure Reporting**: For generating test reports
- **Dify API**: The system under test (chat and workflow endpoints)
- **Data Models**: Using Python dataclasses for structured data
- **CSV Parsing**: Multiple CSV formats need to be unified
- **Dynamic Rendering**: Using `utils.dynamic_renderer` for template variable substitution
- **Test Case Filtering**: Supporting selective test execution based on various criteria
- **Workflow Types**: CHAT (conversational) vs WORKFLOW (execution-based)
- **Session Management**: Multi-turn conversation support with conversation_id caching
- **Fixture Pattern**: Pytest fixtures for client_factory and evaluator

## 4. Relevant Files and Code

- **`utils/test_case_model.py`** (CREATED)
 - Defines `UnifiedTestCase` dataclass with all standardized fields
 - Includes `WorkflowType` and `TestCaseType` enums
 - Methods: `to_dict()`, `get_workflow_type()`, `should_check_human_transfer()`, `get_user_id()`
 - 115 lines total

- **`utils/case_loader.py`** (CREATED)
 - `CaseLoader` class with methods:
 - `load_cases()` - Main entry point for loading a single file
 - `load_multiple_files()` - Load multiple CSV files
 - `_read_csv()` - CSV file reader
 - `_identify_parser()` - Auto-detect CSV format
 - `_parse_golden_dataset()` - Parser for golden_dataset.csv format
 - `_parse_xiaofang_fz_cases()` - Parser for xiaofang_fz_cases.csv format (with Order_Detail and Chat_History)
 - `_parse_exports_format()` - Parser for Langfuse export format
 - `_parse_default_format()` - Fallback parser
 - `_apply_filter()` - Filter cases by various criteria
 - 314 lines total

- **`data/golden_dataset.csv`** (EXAMINED)
 - Format: Case_ID, Target_Agent, Session_Key, 场景描述, Input_Query, Dynamic_Inputs, Expected_Action, Assert
 - Contains chat-based test cases with JSON in Dynamic_Inputs column

- **`data/xiaofang_fz_cases.csv`** (EXAMINED)
 - Format: Case_ID, Target_Agent, Session_Key, 场景描述, Order_Detail, Dynamic_Inputs, Expected_Action, Assert, Chat_History
 - Contains workflow execution test cases with order details and chat history

- **`data/exports_*.csv`** (EXAMINED)
 - Langfuse export format with columns: id, projectId, datasetId, input, expectedOutput, metadata
 - Different structure requiring special parsing

- **`tests/test_xiaofang_fz.py`** (EXAMINED)
 - Current test implementation using `load_excel_cases()` from file_loader
 - Uses parametrize with test_cases list
 - Implements HISTORY_CACHE for session management
 - Has two validation steps: hard_check and special field check

- **`tests/test_xiaofang_fz_todo.py`** (EXAMINED)
 - Workflow execution tests
 - Uses dynamic_renderer for template rendering
 - Handles Order_Detail and Chat_History fields

- **`tests/conftest.py`** (EXAMINED)
 - Defines fixtures: config, client_factory, evaluator
 - client_factory returns DifyClient instances based on agent_key

- **`utils/file_loader.py`** (EXAMINED)
 - Old implementation using pandas
 - `load_excel_cases()` function - to be replaced

- **`config/config.yaml`** (EXAMINED)
 - Defines agents: first_visit, follow_up, todo_exec_first, todo_exec_follow
 - Each agent has api_key and workflow_type

## 5. Problem Solving

**Problems Identified:**
1. Multiple CSV formats with different column structures
2. No unified data model causing code duplication
3. Each test file hardcoded to specific CSV format
4. No filtering mechanism for selective test execution
5. Session management scattered across test files

**Solutions Implemented:**
1. Created `UnifiedTestCase` dataclass to standardize all test data
2. Implemented `CaseLoader` with format auto-detection and multiple parsers
3. Added filtering capabilities (by case_ids, tags, agents, enabled status)
4. Integrated with existing `dynamic_renderer` for template variable support

**Technical Challenge Encountered:**
- Initial file save attempt for case_loader.py was interrupted, requiring a retry
- Successfully completed on second attempt with all 314 lines

## 6. Pending Tasks and Next Steps

**Immediate Next Step (where I left off):**
The last action was successfully creating the `case_loader.py` file with all parser implementations. The next step is to create a unified test executor.

**Remaining Tasks:**

1. **Create Unified Test Executor** (`tests/test_unified.py`)
 - Single test class that works with all case types
 - Use the new `CaseLoader` to load cases
 - Support both CHAT and WORKFLOW execution paths
 - Implement proper session management with HISTORY_CACHE
 - Handle both hard_check and special assertions

2. **Update conftest.py**
 - Add fixture for `case_loader` 
 - Potentially add filtering configuration

3. **Create Example Usage/Documentation**
 - Show how to run specific test cases
 - Document filtering options
 - Provide examples of loading different CSV formats

4. **Update run_test.py (optional)**
 - Add command-line arguments for case filtering
 - Support specifying which CSV files to load

**Code Pattern to Follow:**
```python
# Expected pattern for unified test
from utils.case_loader import CaseLoader

loader = CaseLoader("data")
test_cases = loader.load_cases(
 "golden_dataset.csv",
 case_filter={"target_agents": ["follow_up"], "enabled": True}
)

@pytest.mark.parametrize("case", test_cases)
def test_unified_execution(case, client_factory, evaluator):
 # Unified execution logic for all case types
 pass
```

**User's Original Request (verbatim):**
"仔细阅读项目文件，帮我重构读取测试用例并执行这一块的代码，目前data目录下的四份测试用例文件，后期我希望这些数据结构传入到测试脚本是同一的数据格式，且测试脚本也要支持同一个脚本支持所有的用例文件传入，支持选择性执行某些测试用例"
</summary>

Continue the conversation and finish the task given by the user from this point.
</supervisor>","Ok. I will continue the conversation from this point.","type","content","a|D|2O|2P","n|2","o|2Q|2R|b|2N","tool_use","a|D|2O|2P|2T","n|1","n|5","tool_use_id","tool_name","input_json","mcp_server_name","mcp_tool_name","a|2X|2Y|2Z|2a|2b","toolu_8kekspo1ip5fhoyhp1dxy4cq","save-file","{"file_content": "\"\"\"\n统一的测试执行器\n支持执行不同类型的测试用例（Chat和Workflow）\n\"\"\"\nimport json\nimport time\nfrom typing import Dict, Any, Tuple\nfrom utils.test_case_model import UnifiedTestCase, WorkflowType\n\n\nclass TestExecutor:\n \"\"\"测试执行器\"\"\"\n \n def __init__(self, client_factory, evaluator, history_cache: Dict[str, str] = None):\n \"\"\"\n 初始化执行器\n \n Args:\n client_factory: 客户端工厂函数\n evaluator: 评估器实例\n history_cache: 会话历史缓存\n \"\"\"\n self.client_factory = client_factory\n self.evaluator = evaluator\n self.history_cache = history_cache or {}\n \n def execute_case(self, case: UnifiedTestCase) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n \"\"\"\n 执行单个测试用例\n \n Args:\n case: 统一格式的测试用例\n \n Returns:\n 执行结果字典，包含 response, validation_result 等\n \"\"\"\n # 获取客户端\n try:\n client = self.client_factory(case.target_agent)\n except ValueError as e:\n return {\n \"success\": False,\n \"error\": str(e),\n \"case_id\": case.case_id\n }\n \n # 准备请求参数\n request_params = self._prepare_request(case)\n \n # 执行请求\n workflow_type = case.get_workflow_type()\n if workflow_type == WorkflowType.CHAT:\n response = self._execute_chat(client, request_params, case)\n else:\n response = self._execute_workflow(client, request_params, case)\n \n # 更新会话缓存\n if case.session_key and response.get(\"conversation_id\"):\n self.history_cache[case.session_key] = response[\"conversation_id\"]\n \n # 执行校验\n validation_result = self._validate_response(case, response)\n \n return {\n \"success\": validation_result[\"passed\"],\n \"case_id\": case.case_id,\n \"request\": request_params,\n \"response\": response,\n \"validation\": validation_result\n }\n \n def _prepare_request(self, case: UnifiedTestCase) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n \"\"\"准备请求参数\"\"\"\n params = {\n \"query\": case.input_query,\n \"inputs\": case.dynamic_inputs.copy(),\n \"user\": case.get_user_id()\n }\n \n # 处理会话ID\n if case.session_key and case.session_key in self.history_cache:\n params[\"conversation_id\"] = self.history_cache[case.session_key]\n elif case.conversation_id:\n params[\"conversation_id\"] = case.conversation_id\n else:\n params[\"conversation_id\"] = \"\"\n \n # 处理订单详情（工作流类型）\n if case.order_detail:\n params[\"inputs\"][\"orderDetail\"] = json.dumps(case.order_detail, ensure_ascii=False)\n \n # 处理聊天历史\n if case.chat_history:\n params[\"inputs\"][\"messages\"] = json.dumps(case.chat_history, ensure_ascii=False)\n \n return params\n \n def _execute_chat(\n self, \n client, \n params: Dict[str, Any], \n case: UnifiedTestCase\n ) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n \"\"\"执行Chat类型的请求\"\"\"\n try:\n response = client.send_message(\n query=params[\"query\"],\n inputs=params[\"inputs\"],\n user=params[\"user\"],\n conversation_id=params.get(\"conversation_id\", \"\")\n )\n return response\n except Exception as e:\n return {\n \"error\": str(e),\n \"status\": \"failed\"\n }\n \n def _execute_workflow(\n self, \n client, \n params: Dict[str, Any], \n case: UnifiedTestCase\n ) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n \"\"\"执行Workflow类型的请求\"\"\"\n try:\n response = client.run_workflow(\n inputs=params[\"inputs\"],\n user=params[\"user\"]\n )\n return response\n except Exception as e:\n return {\n \"error\": str(e),\n \"status\": \"failed\"\n }\n \n def _validate_response(\n self, \n case: UnifiedTestCase, \n response: Dict[str, Any]\n ) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n \"\"\"\n 校验响应结果\n \n Returns:\n 校验结果字典\n \"\"\"\n validation_result = {\n \"passed\": True,\n \"errors\": [],\n \"checks\": []\n }\n \n # 检查响应状态\n if \"error\" in response:\n validation_result[\"passed\"] = False\n validation_result[\"errors\"].append(f\"请求失败: {response['error']}\")\n return validation_result\n \n # 提取AI回复内容\n ai_reply = self._extract_reply(response)\n \n # 执行硬规则检查\n hard_check_passed, hard_errors = self.evaluator.hard_check(\n ai_reply, \n case.expected_action\n )\n \n validation_result[\"checks\"].append({\n \"type\": \"hard_check\",\n \"passed\": hard_check_passed,\n \"errors\": hard_errors\n })\n \n if not hard_check_passed:\n validation_result[\"passed\"] = False\n validation_result[\"errors\"].extend(hard_errors)\n \n # 检查转人工（如果需要）\n if case.should_check_human_transfer():\n human_check_result = self._check_human_transfer(response)\n validation_result[\"checks\"].append(human_check_result)\n \n if not human_check_result[\"passed\"]:\n validation_result[\"passed\"] = False\n validation_result[\"errors\"].extend(human_check_result[\"errors\"])\n \n return validation_result\n \n def _extract_reply(self, response: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n \"\"\"从响应中提取AI回复内容\"\"\"\n # 尝试从 json_data 中提取\n structured_data = response.get(\"json_data\")\n if isinstance(structured_data, dict):\n msg_list = structured_data.get(\"messageList\", [])\n if msg_list:\n return msg_list[0].get(\"content\", \"\")\n \n # 尝试从 answer 中提取\n return response.get(\"answer\", \"\")\n \n def _check_human_transfer(self, response: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n \"\"\"检查转人工相关字段\"\"\"\n result = {\n \"type\": \"human_transfer_check\",\n \"passed\": True,\n \"errors\": []\n }\n \n structured_data = response.get(\"json_data\", {})\n \n # 检查 needHuman 字段\n need_human = structured_data.get(\"needHuman\")\n if need_human is not True:\n result[\"passed\"] = False\n result[\"errors\"].append(\n f\"期望 needHuman 为 True，实际为 {need_human}\"\n )\n \n # 检查 messageList 是否为空\n msg_list = structured_data.get(\"messageList\", [])\n for idx, msg in enumerate(msg_list):\n content = msg.get(\"content\")\n if content != \"\":\n result[\"passed\"] = False\n result[\"errors\"].append(\n f\"messageList 第 {idx + 1} 条消息 content 不为空: '{content}'\"\n )\n \n return result\n", "instructions_reminder": "LIMIT THE FILE CONTENT TO AT MOST 150 LINES. IF MORE CONTENT NEEDS TO BE ADDED USE THE str-replace-editor TOOL TO EDIT THE FILE AFTER IT HAS BEEN CREATED.", "path": {"diagramDefinition":"graph TB subgraph "数据层" CSV1[golden_dataset.csv] CSV2[xiaofang_fz_cases.csv] CSV3[exports_*.csv] CSV4[其他CSV文件] end subgraph "加载层" Loader[CaseLoader
用例加载器] Parser1[Golden解析器] Parser2[XiaoFang解析器] Parser3[Exports解析器] Parser4[默认解析器] end subgraph "模型层" Model[UnifiedTestCase
统一数据模型] Filter[过滤器] end subgraph "执行层" Executor[TestExecutor
测试执行器] ChatExec[Chat执行] WorkflowExec[Workflow执行] end subgraph "校验层" Validator[结果校验器] HardCheck[硬规则检查] SoftCheck[LLM评分] HumanCheck[转人工检查] end subgraph "报告层" Allure[Allure报告] Result[测试结果] end CSV1 --> Loader CSV2 --> Loader CSV3 --> Loader CSV4 --> Loader Loader --> Parser1 Loader --> Parser2 Loader --> Parser3 Loader --> Parser4 Parser1 --> Model Parser2 --> Model Parser3 --> Model Parser4 --> Model Model --> Filter Filter --> Executor Executor --> ChatExec Executor --> WorkflowExec ChatExec --> Validator WorkflowExec --> Validator Validator --> HardCheck Validator --> SoftCheck Validator --> HumanCheck HardCheck --> Result SoftCheck --> Result HumanCheck --> Result Result --> Allure style Model fill:#e1f5ff style Executor fill:#fff4e1 style Validator fill:#f0ffe1 style Allure fill:#ffe1f5 ","title":"统一测试框架架构图"}
